zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Plumpton於1335年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，她的父親William de Plumpton41歲，母親Christina Mowbray30歲。她於1352年與Sir Richard Sherburne在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年11月6日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Plumpton于1335年出生在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾时，她的父亲William de Plumpton41岁，母亲Christina Mowbray30岁。她于1352年与Sir Richard Sherburne在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年11月6日在英国英格兰藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Plumpton was born in 1335, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Plumpton, was 41 and her mother, Christina Mowbray, was 30. She married Sir Richard Sherburne in 1352, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 6 November 1408, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

Elle a épousé Sir Richard Sherburne en 1352, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England, UK: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Plumpton(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Plumpton(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina Mowbray(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir Richard Sherburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England, UK: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Plumpton родилась в 1335 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Plumpton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Christina Mowbray, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Sherburne в 1352 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 ноября 1408 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.
